Third Sunday each month May through October—free ice cream social in Hall B. Flavor of the week, cones and bowls, 1:00–1:30 PM. Kids and residents welcome; no fee or RSVP.

Join us this Memorial Day as we come together to honor the sacrifices of our Armed Forces and remember those who gave everything in service to our nation. Dinner begins at 12:00 PM and will feature classic hot dogs and authentic Iowa-style Maid-Rite sandwiches. This is a community pot luck, so guests are encouraged to bring their favorite sides and desserts to share. Enjoy good food, great company, and a moment of gratitude as we celebrate the spirit of remembrance and fellowship together.
No featured entertainment is scheduled for this Saturday. The hall and evening time may be available for a community or private event—contact the event coordinator to discuss options.

Hall B is reserved for a private event from 1:00–6:00 PM. Residents are asked to respect the reservation and keep foot traffic through Hall B to a minimum during that time. Halls A and C remain available for other activities.

Father's Day at McAllen Mobile Park belongs to the dads, granddads, stepdads, uncles, and every father-figure who shows up for this community year after year. Join us for a hearty potluck dinner with neighbors who know how to cook and how to tell a story—bring a favorite dish to share, pull up a chair, and pass the plates with pride. Please bring your own plates, silverware, and drinks. Stop by Hall A in the days ahead to sign up and give us a head count so we can welcome everyone comfortably. Dinner begins at 1:00 PM. When the table quiets down, wander over to Hall B for our monthly ice cream social at 1:45 PM—cones, bowls, and a sweet finish to the afternoon together.

On this Sunday we scoop right after the Father's Day potluck wraps in Hall A. Same friendly third-Sunday tradition May through October: free ice cream in Hall B, flavor of the week, cones and bowls, 1:45–2:15 PM. Kids and residents welcome; no fee or RSVP.
